title: Successful Login with Username and Password Redirects to Dashboard
description: Verifies that a registered user can authenticate using a valid username (non-email) and password combination, and is successfully redirected to the dashboard after authentication.
expected_result: User successfully authenticates with a username and password, the submit button is disabled during loading to prevent duplicate submissions, and the user is redirected to /dashboard with the dashboard content rendered.

test_steps.expected: Login page is displayed at /login URL

test_steps.action: Verify the username field label is visible
test_steps.expected: Label 'Username' is visible on the page

test_steps.action: Enter valid username into the username/email field
Enter valid password into the password field
Click the Submit / Sign In button
test_steps.expected: Loading state is displayed and button is disabled to prevent duplicate submission

test_steps.action: Wait for dashboard to load after successful login
Verify the dashboard container is rendered
